name: Marketplace
description: Browse, discover and install apps in Imperal Marketplace from chat. Webbee can recommend apps matching what you need, show details and reviews, install or remove apps with confirmation.

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_marketplace_status
tools.description: Marketplace catalog snapshot: featured apps + category list. Read by LLM each turn so it knows what's available without calling search_marketplace.

tools.name: search_marketplace
tools.description: Search apps in the Imperal Marketplace by free-text query. Use when user asks 'do you have X', 'is there an app for Y', 'find me an extension for Z'. Returns up to 20 results.

params_schema.description: Search Marketplace by free-text keyword + optional category.

query.description: Free-text search query — matches app name and description substring. Pass the user's wording verbatim when possible.
query.title: Query

category.description: Optional Marketplace category filter (productivity, communication, media, analytics, etc). Omit for all categories.
category.title: Category

params_schema.title: SearchAppsParams

tools.name: get_app_details
tools.description: Get full details for a specific Marketplace app — description, version, install count, average rating, category, install status for current user, tags. Use after search_marketplace when user asks 'tell me more about X' or 'what does X do'.

params_schema.description: Target a specific Marketplace app by id.

app_id.description: Marketplace app id (e.g. 'spotify', 'mail', 'notes'). Pull from prior search_apps result or skeleton featured list. NEVER fabricate.
app_id.title: App Id

params_schema.title: AppIdParams

tools.name: list_my_installed
tools.description: List apps currently installed for the user (excludes system apps like admin/billing which are always on). Use when user asks 'what apps do I have', 'show my installed extensions'.
